title: United Separatists
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''United Separatists''' were a political party that butted heads with [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] on several occasions. It is unknown if they had had ties to, or were former members of, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
